cards.back: The process of adding headers and trailers to data frames to prepare them for transmission over a communication channel
The process of regulating the amount of data that can be sent over a communication link at any given time, preventing network congestion
The process of detecting and correcting errors in data transmission, ensuring reliable data transfer
Transmission method where data is sent independently, without establishing a connection with the destination before sending
Transmission method where a connection is established between the sender and receiver before data transmission begins
